import React from 'react'; import './About.css'; const About = () => { return (
{/* Hero Section */}

About WildlifEDU

Empowering conservation through education

{/* Mission Section */}

Our Mission

WildlifEDU is dedicated to wildlife conservation education with a special focus on endangered species in Africa. We work with local communities, nature care institutions, and specialists to promote sustainable conservation practices and eco-tourism.

{/* Values Section */}

Our Core Values

Sustainability

Promoting practices that ensure long-term ecological balance and wildlife preservation.

Education

Empowering communities through knowledge and awareness about wildlife conservation.

Community

Working together with local communities to create sustainable conservation solutions.

Local Focus

Addressing the unique challenges and opportunities in African wildlife conservation.

{/* Team Section */}

Our Team

Dr. Sarah Johnson

Conservation Director

James Mwangi

Education Coordinator

Dr. Amina Hassan

Research Lead

David Ochieng

Community Outreach

{/* Partners Section */}

Our Partners

{/* Impact Section */}

Conservation Projects

1000+

); }; export default About;
